Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: exports Hono class, type aliases (Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, Context types, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType)
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Context, HonoRequest
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: main entry point, re-exports the Hono function and shared type definitions for users to import
+- Copy-safe detail: 53 lines, 1 main export, delegates to ./hono for implementation
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Env, Variables, Next, Input, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, Context, Router, H, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, AddSchemaIfHasResponse, MergeResponse, AddSchemaIfHasResponse, Response, ResponseOrInit, TypedResponse, JSONRespondReturn, RequestResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types, ./router
+- Plain-English summary: comprehensive type definitions for Hono including env vars, handlers, routes, schema, client types
+- Copy-safe detail: 1000+ lines, heavy use of TypeScript generics and conditional types
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, options, constructor, router, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: concrete Hono class extending HonoBase, sets up router, exports as main module
+- Copy-safe detail: 34 lines, simple constructor, delegates to HonoBase
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: get, post, put, delete, options, patch, on, use, route, basePath, onError, notFound, mount, fetch, request, fire
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, compose, Context, router, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, _basePath, routes, #clone, #dispatch, options
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: base Hono class implementing router, middleware, error/not-found handling, request dispatch
+- Copy-safe detail: 545 lines, core routing and middleware composition logic
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, renderer, html, text, json, body, redirect, header, get, set, var, notFound
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, Result, Env, ExecutionContext, DefaultRenderer, Renderer, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, JSONRespondReturn, HTMLRespond, setDefaultContentType, createResponseInstance, TEXT_PLAIN
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/headers, ./utils/html, ./utils/mime
+- Plain-English summary: request/response context class handling variables, headers, status code, response creation
+- Copy-safe detail: 780 lines, central request/response coordination
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, cloneRawRequest utility
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, HTTPException, RESULT, parseBody, getPath, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, tryDecode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: parses request URL, methods, headers, query/param paths, body (text/json/form-data)
+- Copy-safe detail: 505 lines, body parsing and request metadata
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
+- Internal names noticed: (none, single export)
+- Imports or neighbors: (none)
+- Plain-English summary: module exports unique symbol for matching result structure
+- Copy-safe detail: 1 line, single constant symbol export
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody function, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions types
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: parses form data bodies, handles dot notation and array values for form submission
+- Copy-safe detail: 233 lines, form body parsing for multipart and url-encoded types
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function
+- Internal names noticed: compose, dispatch, context, Next, ErrorHandler, NotFoundHandler, index
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: composes middleware into sequential handler chain with error/not-found fallback
+- Copy-safe detail: 73 lines, koa-style middleware composition pattern
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class, getResponse method
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, res, status, options
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: throws HTTP errors with optional response, 5xx or client errors
+- Copy-safe detail: 78 lines, extends Error, optionally pre-built response
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: (none, all re-exports)
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: client module re-export point for hc function and utility helpers
+- Copy-safe detail: 17 lines, minimal entry point
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc, ClientRequestImpl class, fetch method
+- Internal names noticed: proxyCallback, createProxy, ClientRequestImpl, buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, unionToIntersection
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../utils/cookie, ./types, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client via proxy, builds URL/request, handles params/query/body serialization
+- Copy-safe detail: 223 lines, request builder pattern with path params and method chaining
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: Client, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, Fetch, hc, hc options
+- Internal names noticed: ExpandAllMethod, StandardMethods, HonoRequest, ClientRequestOptions, ClientResponse, BuildSearchParamsFn, TypedURL, HonoURL, ExtractSchema, Endpoint, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, PickResponseByStatusCode, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferRequestOptionsType, GlobalResponseDefinition, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types
+- Plain-English summary: client API types, schema extraction, request/response inference, proxy-based client building
+- Copy-safe detail: 393 lines, conditional types and schema inference
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: buildSearchParams, deepMerge, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, mergePath, parseResponse
+- Internal names noticed: DetailedError, fetchRP, isObject, ContentfulStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, ClientErrorStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: URL utilities, query string builders, deep merge, response type guard parsing
+- Copy-safe detail: 114 lines, client helper utilities for requests
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError class, detectResponseType function
+- Internal names noticed: (none, self-contained)
+- Imports or neighbors: (none)
+- Plain-English summary: wraps fetch with smart response parsing, JSON detection, throws errors on non-2xx
+- Copy-safe detail: 96 lines, parses response by Content-Type header
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire function
+- Internal names noticed: handle, Hono, addEventListener('fetch')
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: registers Hono app as service worker fetch handler via addEventListener
+- Copy-safe detail: 36 lines, adapter for Service Worker environment
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle function
+- Internal names noticed: FetchEvent, respondWith, HandleOptions, fetch, evt, app
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./types
+- Plain-English searchWorker: 37 lines, executes app.fetch in async handler responding to event
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface, ExtendableEvent interface
+- Internal names noticed: request, handled, preloadResponse, respondWith, clientId, resultingClientId
+- Imports or neighbors: (none)
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker event definitions, fetch event with preload support
+- Copy-safe detail: 15 lines, event types for SW adapter
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/index.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+
+Task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md.

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

I need to complete this benchmark task for the core-api-read-write-ledger. Let me break down what I need to do:

1. First, create the bench-artifacts directory if it doesn't exist
2. Read all the specified files from the repository
3. Create the bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md file with the specified format
4. Don't make any source-code changes
5. The output should list all file paths in a Path Inventory section

Let me start by creating the directory and reading all the files. I'll need to read these files in parallel since they're independent reads.

Files to read:
- src/index.ts
- src/types.ts
- src/hono.ts
- src/hono-base.ts
- src/context.ts
- src/request.ts
- src/request/constants.ts
- src/utils/body.ts
- src/compose.ts
- src/http-exception.ts
- src/client/index.ts
- src/client/client.ts
- src/client/types.ts
- src/client/utils.ts
- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

I can read multiple files in parallel with the read tool. Let me start with the first batch.
I'll read all the specified files in parallel, then create the benchmark artifact file. Let me start by reading all the files.
